TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Enrique_Pe√Īa_Nieto, title = Enrique_Pe√Īa_Nieto, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Enrique_Pe√Īa_Nieto} }

S.FORM: I 1966 a miheca saka 7 folad saka 20 a romi'ad masofoc ci Enrique Pe√Īa Nieto , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Mexico anini i ci Enrique Pe√Īa Nieto, patirengan a romi'ad i 2012 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 1 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i …ônri*o~u~u…ô p…ô*a ni…ôto~u , ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u m…ôxi ¶o~u anini i ¶i …ônri*o~u~u…ô p…ô*a ni…ôto~u, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: I 1966 a miheca saka 7 folad saka 20 a romi'ad masofoc ci Enrique Pe√Īa Nieto , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Mexico anini i ci Enrique Pe√Īa Nieto, patirengan a romi'ad i 2012 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 1 a romi'ad.
